con:part.con:content: <wsdl:definitions name="VisualizationService" targetNamespace="http://tempuri.org/" xmlns:wsdl="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:soapenc="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/" xmlns:wsu="http://docs.oasis-open.org/wss/2004/01/oasis-200401-wss-wssecurity-utility-1.0.xsd" xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/soap/" xmlns:soap12="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/soap12/" xmlns:tns="http://tempuri.org/" xmlns:wsa="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2004/08/addressing" xmlns:wsx="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2004/09/mex" xmlns:wsap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2004/08/addressing/policy" xmlns:wsaw="http://www.w3.org/2006/05/addressing/wsdl" xmlns:msc="http://schemas.microsoft.com/ws/2005/12/wsdl/contract" xmlns:wsp="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2004/09/policy" xmlns:wsa10="http://www.w3.org/2005/08/addressing" xmlns:wsam="http://www.w3.org/2007/05/addressing/metadata"> <wsdl:types> <xsd:schema targetNamespace="http://tempuri.org/Imports"> <xsd:import schemaLocation="http://sdb.dtu.dk/VisualizationService/VisualizationService.svc?xsd=xsd0" namespace="http://tempuri.org/"/> <xsd:import schemaLocation="http://sdb.dtu.dk/VisualizationService/VisualizationService.svc?xsd=xsd1" namespace="http://schemas.microsoft.com/2003/10/Serialization/"/> <xsd:import schemaLocation="http://sdb.dtu.dk/VisualizationService/VisualizationService.svc?xsd=xsd2" namespace="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/Studybase.VisualizationService"/> </xsd:schema> </wsdl:types> <wsdl:message name="IVisualizationService_GetVisualizationsInEducation_InputMessage"> <wsdl:part name="parameters" element="tns:GetVisualizationsInEducation"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="IVisualizationService_GetVisualizationsInEducation_OutputMessage"> <wsdl:part name="parameters" element="tns:GetVisualizationsInEducationResponse"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="IVisualizationService_GetVisualization_InputMessage"> <wsdl:part name="parameters" element="tns:GetVisualization"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="IVisualizationService_GetVisualization_OutputMessage"> <wsdl:part name="parameters" element="tns:GetVisualizationResponse"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="IVisualizationService_GetVisualizationByGuid_InputMessage"> <wsdl:part name="parameters" element="tns:GetVisualizationByGuid"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="IVisualizationService_GetVisualizationByGuid_OutputMessage"> <wsdl:part name="parameters" element="tns:GetVisualizationByGuidResponse"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="IVisualizationService_GetVisualizationDraft_InputMessage"> <wsdl:part name="parameters" element="tns:GetVisualizationDraft"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="IVisualizationService_GetVisualizationDraft_OutputMessage"> <wsdl:part name="parameters" element="tns:GetVisualizationDraftResponse"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="IVisualizationService_GetGeneralVisualization_InputMessage"> <wsdl:part name="parameters" element="tns:GetGeneralVisualization"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="IVisualizationService_GetGeneralVisualization_OutputMessage"> <wsdl:part name="parameters" element="tns:GetGeneralVisualizationResponse"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:portType name="IVisualizationService"> <wsdl:operation name="GetVisualizationsInEducation"> <wsdl:input wsaw:Action="http://tempuri.org/IVisualizationService/GetVisualizationsInEducation" message="tns:IVisualizationService_GetVisualizationsInEducation_InputMessage"/> <wsdl:output wsaw:Action="http://tempuri.org/IVisualizationService/GetVisualizationsInEducationResponse" message="tns:IVisualizationService_GetVisualizationsInEducation_OutputMessage"/> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="GetVisualization"> <wsdl:input wsaw:Action="http://tempuri.org/IVisualizationService/GetVisualization" message="tns:IVisualizationService_GetVisualization_InputMessage"/> <wsdl:output wsaw:Action="http://tempuri.org/IVisualizationService/GetVisualizationResponse" message="tns:IVisualizationService_GetVisualization_OutputMessage"/> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="GetVisualizationByGuid"> <wsdl:input wsaw:Action="http://tempuri.org/IVisualizationService/GetVisualizationByGuid" message="tns:IVisualizationService_GetVisualizationByGuid_InputMessage"/> <wsdl:output wsaw:Action="http://tempuri.org/IVisualizationService/GetVisualizationByGuidResponse" message="tns:IVisualizationService_GetVisualizationByGuid_OutputMessage"/> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="GetVisualizationDraft"> <wsdl:input wsaw:Action="http://tempuri.org/IVisualizationService/GetVisualizationDraft" message="tns:IVisualizationService_GetVisualizationDraft_InputMessage"/> <wsdl:output wsaw:Action="http://tempuri.org/IVisualizationService/GetVisualizationDraftResponse" message="tns:IVisualizationService_GetVisualizationDraft_OutputMessage"/> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="GetGeneralVisualization"> <wsdl:input wsaw:Action="http://tempuri.org/IVisualizationService/GetGeneralVisualization" message="tns:IVisualizationService_GetGeneralVisualization_InputMessage"/> <wsdl:output wsaw:Action="http://tempuri.org/IVisualizationService/GetGeneralVisualizationResponse" message="tns:IVisualizationService_GetGeneralVisualization_OutputMessage"/> </wsdl:operation> </wsdl:portType> <wsdl:binding name="BasicHttpBinding_IVisualizationService" type="tns:IVisualizationService"> <soap:binding transport="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/http"/> <wsdl:operation name="GetVisualizationsInEducation"> <soap:operation soapAction="http://tempuri.org/IVisualizationService/GetVisualizationsInEducation" style="document"/> <wsdl:input> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="GetVisualization"> <soap:operation soapAction="http://tempuri.org/IVisualizationService/GetVisualization" style="document"/> <wsdl:input> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="GetVisualizationByGuid"> <soap:operation soapAction="http://tempuri.org/IVisualizationService/GetVisualizationByGuid" style="document"/> <wsdl:input> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="GetVisualizationDraft"> <soap:operation soapAction="http://tempuri.org/IVisualizationService/GetVisualizationDraft" style="document"/> <wsdl:input> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="GetGeneralVisualization"> <soap:operation soapAction="http://tempuri.org/IVisualizationService/GetGeneralVisualization" style="document"/> <wsdl:input> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> </wsdl:binding> <wsdl:service name="VisualizationService"> <wsdl:port name="BasicHttpBinding_IVisualizationService" binding="tns:BasicHttpBinding_IVisualizationService"> <soap:address location="https://sdb.dtu.dk/VisualizationService/VisualizationService.svc"/> </wsdl:port> </wsdl:service> </wsdl:definitions>

<xs:schema elementFormDefault="qualified" targetNamespace="http://tempuri.org/" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:tns="http://tempuri.org/"> <xs:import schemaLocation="http://sdb.dtu.dk/VisualizationService/VisualizationService.svc?xsd=xsd2" namespace="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/Studybase.VisualizationService"/> <xs:import schemaLocation="http://sdb.dtu.dk/VisualizationService/VisualizationService.svc?xsd=xsd1" namespace="http://schemas.microsoft.com/2003/10/Serialization/"/> <xs:element name="GetVisualizationsInEducation"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="id" type="xs:int"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> <xs:element name="GetVisualizationsInEducationResponse"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="GetVisualizationsInEducationResult" nillable="true" type="q1:ArrayOfVisualization" xmlns:q1="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/Studybase.VisualizationService"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> <xs:element name="GetVisualization"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="visualizationId" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="code" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="volume" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="language" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> <xs:element name="GetVisualizationResponse"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="GetVisualizationResult" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> <xs:element name="GetVisualizationByGuid"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="visualizationGuid" type="q2:guid" xmlns:q2="http://schemas.microsoft.com/2003/10/Serialization/"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="code" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="volume" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="language" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> <xs:element name="GetVisualizationByGuidResponse"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="GetVisualizationByGuidResult" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> <xs:element name="GetVisualizationDraft"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="visualizationId" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="code" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="volume" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="language" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> <xs:element name="GetVisualizationDraftResponse"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="GetVisualizationDraftResult" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> <xs:element name="GetGeneralVisualization"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="visualizationGuid" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="volume" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="language" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> <xs:element name="GetGeneralVisualizationResponse"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="GetGeneralVisualizationResult" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> </xs:schema>

<xs:schema elementFormDefault="qualified" targetNamespace="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/Studybase.VisualizationService" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:ser="http://schemas.microsoft.com/2003/10/Serialization/" xmlns:tns="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/Studybase.VisualizationService"> <xs:import schemaLocation="http://sdb.dtu.dk/VisualizationService/VisualizationService.svc?xsd=xsd1" namespace="http://schemas.microsoft.com/2003/10/Serialization/"/> <xs:complexType name="ArrayOfVisualization"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" name="Visualization" nillable="true" type="tns:Visualization"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:element name="ArrayOfVisualization" nillable="true" type="tns:ArrayOfVisualization"/> <xs:complexType name="Visualization"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="Guid" type="ser:guid"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="Id" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="Name" nillable="true" type="tns:LanguageItem"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:element name="Visualization" nillable="true" type="tns:Visualization"/> <xs:complexType name="LanguageItem"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="Danish" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="English" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:element name="LanguageItem" nillable="true" type="tns:LanguageItem"/> </xs:schema>

<xs:schema attributeFormDefault="qualified" elementFormDefault="qualified" targetNamespace="http://schemas.microsoft.com/2003/10/Serialization/" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:tns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/2003/10/Serialization/"> <xs:element name="anyType" nillable="true" type="xs:anyType"/> <xs:element name="anyURI" nillable="true" type="xs:anyURI"/> <xs:element name="base64Binary" nillable="true" type="xs:base64Binary"/> <xs:element name="boolean" nillable="true" type="xs:boolean"/> <xs:element name="byte" nillable="true" type="xs:byte"/> <xs:element name="dateTime" nillable="true" type="xs:dateTime"/> <xs:element name="decimal" nillable="true" type="xs:decimal"/> <xs:element name="double" nillable="true" type="xs:double"/> <xs:element name="float" nillable="true" type="xs:float"/> <xs:element name="int" nillable="true" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element name="long" nillable="true" type="xs:long"/> <xs:element name="QName" nillable="true" type="xs:QName"/> <xs:element name="short" nillable="true" type="xs:short"/> <xs:element name="string" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element name="unsignedByte" nillable="true" type="xs:unsignedByte"/> <xs:element name="unsignedInt" nillable="true" type="xs:unsignedInt"/> <xs:element name="unsignedLong" nillable="true" type="xs:unsignedLong"/> <xs:element name="unsignedShort" nillable="true" type="xs:unsignedShort"/> <xs:element name="char" nillable="true" type="tns:char"/> <xs:simpleType name="char"> <xs:restriction base="xs:int"/> </xs:simpleType> <xs:element name="duration" nillable="true" type="tns:duration"/> <xs:simpleType name="duration"> <xs:restriction base="xs:duration"> <xs:pattern value="\-?P(\d*D)?(T(\d*H)?(\d*M)?(\d*(\.\d*)?S)?)?"/> <xs:minInclusive value="-P10675199DT2H48M5.4775808S"/> <xs:maxInclusive value="P10675199DT2H48M5.4775807S"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:element name="guid" nillable="true" type="tns:guid"/> <xs:simpleType name="guid"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:pattern value="[\da-fA-F]{8}-[\da-fA-F]{4}-[\da-fA-F]{4}-[\da-fA-F]{4}-[\da-fA-F]{12}"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:attribute name="FactoryType" type="xs:QName"/> <xs:attribute name="Id" type="xs:ID"/> <xs:attribute name="Ref" type="xs:IDREF"/> </xs:schema>
